name: Herbalist
description: You grasp nature in a way that most never will. You understand the secrets, the healing powers, the hidden strengths. What others see as simple wilderness, you see as a living breathing friend who has given you their bounty.

feats.name: Nature's Cure
feats.description: You know how to quickly make a healing salve to prepare you for the day ahead. As part of your **Daily Preperation**, create a **minor healing potion** or **antidote**. Requires area to have **living fauna**.
